title: Xtra Tender Basque Chicken Roast
description: A tender and flavorful solo dinner dish from the Basque region of Spain, featuring ghee and steam for a moist and delicious chicken roast.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Rinse the chicken thighs and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together the ghee, paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Rub the ghee mixture all over the chicken thighs, making sure they are fully coated.
Place the chicken thighs in a large Dutch oven or oven-safe pot with a lid.
Pour in the lemon juice and chicken broth, making sure the chicken is mostly submerged.
Cover the pot with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Roast the chicken for 30 minutes, then remove the lid and continue roasting for an additional 20 minutes.
Remove the pot from the oven and let the chicken rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
